title: Doctor-Patient Association
prompt_md:
## Goal
Simulate a doctor-patient association where a `Doctor` can be assigned different patients over time and reports who it is treating.

## Input
- Line 1: integer N (1 ≤ N ≤ 5), number of patients.
- Lines 2..N+1: one patient name per line.
- Line N+2: integer M (1 ≤ M ≤ N), the patient index (0-based) the doctor treats first.
- Line N+3: integer K (0 ≤ K < N, K ≠ M), the patient index the doctor is reassigned to.

## Output
Print two lines:
1. `Treating: <first patient name>`
2. `Treating: <second patient name>`

## Requirements
1. Define `struct Patient` with a `std::string name` member.
2. Define `class Doctor` with a `Patient* current{nullptr}` member.
3. `Doctor` must have `void assign(Patient* p)` that sets `current = p`.
4. `Doctor` must have `void report() const` that prints `Treating: <name>` if current is non-null, otherwise `No patient`.
5. Doctor must not own or delete any Patient.
6. Store all Patient objects in a `std::vector<Patient>` in main().

title: Course-Instructor Bidirectional Association
prompt_md:
## Goal
Complete the `assign` function that sets up a bidirectional association between a `Course` and an `Instructor`.

## Input
- Line 1: course title.
- Line 2: instructor name.

## Output
Print exactly two lines:
1. `Course: <title> taught by <instructor name>`
2. `Instructor: <instructor name> teaching <title>`

## Requirements
1. `struct Course` has `std::string title` and `Instructor* instructor{nullptr}`.
2. `struct Instructor` has `std::string name` and `Course* teaching{nullptr}`.
3. Complete the `void assign(Course& c, Instructor& instr)` free function that sets both pointers.
4. `printCourse(const Course&)` prints line 1; `printInstructor(const Instructor&)` prints line 2.
5. Neither Course nor Instructor owns the other; both are stack-allocated in main().

## Notes
- Use a forward declaration for `Course` so `Instructor` can hold a `Course*`.

test_cases.label: Sample: basic assignment
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Course: Calculus taught by DrSmith
Instructor: DrSmith teaching Calculus

test_cases.label: Hidden: different names
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Course: Physics taught by ProfJones
Instructor: ProfJones teaching Physics

test_cases.label: Hidden: single word each
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Course: History taught by Alba
Instructor: Alba teaching History
